name: agentic-coding-fitness

owner.name: Agentic Coding Fitness @ Rust Tech Bar

description: Learn-by-doing skills that recap the 14-week Agentic Coding Fitness course: LLM APIs, tool use, agent loops, MCP, RAG, multi-agent systems, and knowledge-graph memory.

plugins.name: agentic-coding-fitness
plugins.description: 8 concept skills that teach, demo, and run guided labs for everything taught in class: talking to LLMs, tool use, the agent loop, MCP & skills, RAG, multi-agent patterns, agent memory with Neo4j, and choosing models/frameworks.
